revision.comment: Removing broken Commons category link
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:bump-01-18]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] to [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{cat main|Ancient warfare}} {{Commons category|Warfare of the Ancient era}} This category covers warfare in [[Ancient history|Antiquity]] (until c. 500/600 AD). {{CatRel|Warfare of the Middle Ages}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Ancient history|Warfare]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Warfare by period|0000]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Ancient international relations|*]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Category:Ancient warfare]][[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]]

{{cat main|Ancient warfare}} {{Commons category|Warfare of the Ancient era}} This category covers warfare in [[Ancient history|Antiquity]] (until c. 500/600 AD). {{CatRel|Warfare of the Middle Ages}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Ancient history|Warfare]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Warfare by period|0000]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Ancient international relations|*]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Ancient warfare]][[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:new pages]][[Category:new pages]]

{{cat main|Ancient warfare}} {{Commons category|Warfare of the Ancient era}} This category covers warfare in [[Ancient history|Antiquity]] (until c. 500/600 AD). {{CatRel|Warfare of the Middle Ages}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Ancient history|Warfare]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Warfare by period|0000]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Ancient international relations|*]] [[Category:bump-01-18]] [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Ancient warfare]][[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:qq]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]" to ""
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (6 members)
Bot: tidy & size tag (5 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with 5 members
Bot: remove obsolete category Confirmed enwiki categories
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q4476190)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q4476190)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text:
<!--templates-->
{{cat main|Ancient warfare}}
{{Commons category|Warfare of the Ancient era}}
{{CatRel|Warfare of the Middle Ages}}
{{wikidata link|Q4476190}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Ancient warfare]]
[[en:Category:Ancient warfare]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Ancient history|Warfare]]
[[Category:Ancient international relations|*]]
[[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]]
[[Category:Warfare by period|0000]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] (crud category cleanup) [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22556809750|manual triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ancient_warfare here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ancient_warfare for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<!--templates-->
{{cat main|Ancient warfare}}
{{Commons category|Warfare of the Ancient era}}
{{CatRel|Warfare of the Middle Ages}}
{{wikidata link|Q4476190}}
<!--interwikis-->
[[en:Ancient warfare]]
[[en:Category:Ancient warfare]]
<!--categories-->
[[Category:Ancient history|Warfare]]
[[Category:Ancient international relations|*]]
[[Category:Warfare by period|0000]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 2 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25323874049|time triggered pipeline]]
